caption: yo you picking the spot this week or am i stuck with your last call again 😂
bro that place on King was YOUR idea, I just paid for it
fine. heard Workshop on upper king is solid. worth a shot?
yeah I'm in. Wednesday?
can't do wed, Margaux's got us running a full tasting for some private party. thursday?
thursday works. what time you getting out?
if service runs clean maybe 10:30, 11 worst case. don't start without me
lol I'll have one waiting. don't let the kitchen eat you alive
